'''sapungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadfellow|roadfellow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadfellow|roadfellow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sapungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæpingith|sæpingith]] || [[word:sæpingij|sæpingij]] || [[word:sæpingish|sæpingish]] || [[word:sæpingi|sæpingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapupunguth|sapupunguth]] || [[word:sapupunguj|sapupunguj]] || [[word:sapupungush|sapupungush]] || [[word:sapupungu|sapupungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sapunguth|sapunguth]] || [[word:sapunguj|sapunguj]] || [[word:sapungush|sapungush]] || [[word:sapungu|sapungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapufnguth|sapufnguth]] || [[word:sapufnguj|sapufnguj]] || [[word:sapufngush|sapufngush]] || [[word:sapufnguf|sapufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sapunguthu|sapunguthu]] || [[word:sapunguju|sapunguju]] || [[word:sapungushu|sapungushu]] || [[word:sapunguku|sapunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sapunguth|sapunguth]] || [[word:sapunguj|sapunguj]] || [[word:sapungush|sapungush]] || [[word:sapungu|sapungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sapunguthul|sapunguthul]] || [[word:sapungujul|sapungujul]] || [[word:sapungushul|sapungushul]] || [[word:sapungukul|sapungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sapunguthuthu|sapunguthuthu]] || [[word:sapungujuju|sapungujuju]] || [[word:sapungushushu|sapungushushu]] || [[word:sapunguku|sapunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sapunguthun|sapunguthun]] || [[word:sapungujun|sapungujun]] || [[word:sapungushun|sapungushun]] || [[word:sapungukun|sapungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sapunguthuoro|sapunguthuoro]] || [[word:sapungujuoro|sapungujuoro]] || [[word:sapungushuoro|sapungushuoro]] || [[word:sapungukuoro|sapungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
